items.title: Per a league source, Sacramento Kings general manager Scott Perry met with the family of Houston point guard Kingston Flemings this weekend in San Antonio.
items.author: Matt George
items.body_excerpt:
Per a league source, Sacramento Kings general manager Scott Perry met with the family of Houston point guard Kingston Flemings this weekend in San Antonio.

Flemings is expected to be amongst the guards potentially available for the Kings with the 7th pick in the NBA Draft.

items.title: It doesn't appear like Sam Cassell will be a part of this year's NBA coaching cycle.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
It doesn't appear like Sam Cassell will be a part of this year's NBA coaching cycle.

These situations are fluid. And it's possible that the reporting on the remaining coaching searches doesn't tell the whole story. There are also more qualified, deserving coaches than there are opportunities.

1/2

items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Emanuel Sharp worked out for the Pacers last week. He's on most mock drafts in the second round. The Pacers don't have a pick.

“Everywhere you go, you’re being evaluated. That’s how I approach it. It’s not whether the team has a draft pick.” More on the workouts: www.forbes.com/sites/tonyea...
